summary: Added app/composables/useIntlLocale.ts: useIntlBcp47 (from localeProperties.language), useFormattedDateTime and useFormattedNumber wrapping Intl with active locale. Extended en.json and pt-BR.json with showcase.meetup_lead, showcase.photo_gallery_label (pipe pluralization for en vs pt-BR), and showcase.locale_number_sample. HomePage.vue Cursor Meetup section uses localized long date, plural gallery line, and formatted decimal sample. RTL skipped: only en and pt-BR (LTR). Build verified.
